entity.name: trdc_road_name
entity.query: WITH index_base AS ( SELECT 'trdc_road_name'::text AS subclass, gid AS id_in_class, 'gid' AS id_name, 'int:n' AS id_type, CASE WHEN postcode IS NOT NULL AND trim(postcode) <> '' THEN "SITE_NAME" || ', ' || "TOWN" || ' (' || postcode || ')' ELSE "SITE_NAME" || ', ' || "TOWN" END AS displaytext, "SITE_NAME" || ' ' || COALESCE("TOWN", '') AS search_part_1, CASE WHEN postcode IS NOT NULL AND trim(postcode) <> '' THEN replace(upper(postcode), ' ', '') ELSE NULL END AS search_part_2, geom AS geom FROM local_authority."StreetGazetteerRecords_with_postcode" ) SELECT (array_to_json(array_append(ARRAY[subclass::text], id_in_class::text)))::text AS id, displaytext AS display, search_part_1 AS search_1_stem, search_part_2 AS search_2_stem, displaytext AS sort, subclass AS facet, 'trdc' AS tenant, (array_to_json(array_append(ARRAY[id_name::text], id_type::text)))::text AS idfield_meta, (st_asgeojson(st_envelope(geom), 0, 1)::json -> 'bbox')::text AS bbox, st_srid(geom) as srid FROM index_base
